polwithcheck: ((first_name IS NOT NULL) AND (first_name <> ''::text) AND ((email IS NOT NULL) OR (phone IS NOT NULL)))

polqual: ((get_user_role_fast(auth.uid()) = 'invoice_manager'::text) AND ((care_level = ANY (ARRAY['won'::text, 'closed'::text])) OR (invoice_sent = true) OR (invoice_received = true)))
